title: coussarea brevipedunculata
intro: Coussarea brevipedunculata, also known as the Short-stalked Coussarea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparation of Coussarea brevipedunculata is often made into a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
